content:
leamas pushed 7 commits to branch ubuntu/jammy. Commits by Alec Leamas (5) and leamas (2).

  • d/changelog: 5.8.10~alpha2+dfsg-1ubuntu1 provisionary entry (c49ca93b860)
  • d/gbp.conf: set debian-branch (f8bedeb824f)
  • d: New patch disabling time-senistive test (b8bcc776469)
  • d/not-installed: blacklist gtest artifacts (0a931a7eadb)
  • d/copyright: Update to match new libs/shapelib (54e9010f9d0)
  • d/control: Update VCS headers to match openpn/opencpn (592c327c0e6)
  • d/changelog: New bpo version 5.8.10~alpha2+dfsg-1ubuntu1~bpo22.04 (f7c0d26462f)
